message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Re-review: blocking items fixed, CI green">
Luca has addressed all blocking review items and CI is green. Reviewers who had blocking items — please re-review to verify your concerns are resolved:

- Steve Krug, Lea Verou, Steve Schoger: context headings/grouping
- Carson Gross: filter partial swap
- Heydon Pickering: focus management + visible label on context select
- Marty Cagan: your 2 blocking items

If satisfied, please send your consensus approval to luca-palmieri. Kent Beck and Scott Wlaschin already approved.
</teammate-message>

file.content: • Cancel

content.text: I see the template has been restructured with `groups` and context headings, and the list is now wrapped in a `<div id="next-actions-list">` instead of a bare `<ul>`. But I need to check whether the filter links got the explicit HTMX attributes I requested. Let me also check the route handler to see if anything changed there.

I've now reviewed the updated code. Let me evaluate against my blocking item and minor items.

**Blocking item (context filter partial swap):** Looking at `next_actions.html` lines 17-28, the filter links still do NOT have explicit HTMX attributes (`hx-get`, `hx-target`, `hx-swap`, `hx-push-url`). They are still plain `<a>` tags relying on hx-boost for full-page navigation. My blocking concern has **not** been addressed.

However, I see significant improvements were made in response to other reviewers:
- Context grouping with `<section>` + `<h2>` headings in the "All" view (lines 67-77) -- good structural change
- Single flat list when filtering by a specific context (lines 78-85) -- sensible
- The `<select>` now pre-selects the filtered context (line 53) -- nice touch
- The list container is now a `<div id="next-actions-list">` (line 66) wrapping the sections/lists -- this is actually the wrapper I recommended for the partial swap fix

Let me also check the edit cancel link for the minor item.

The cancel link in `next_action_edit.html` (line 21-27) still lacks `aria-label="Cancel editing {{ action.title }}"`.

input.content:
Carson here with re-review. I see good improvements (context grouping with sections/headings, pre-selected context in the select, wrapper div for the list). However: **BLOCKING -- still open:** The filter links in `next_actions.html` (lines 17-28) still lack explicit HTMX attributes. They are plain `` tags relying on hx-boost for full-page reload. My original blocking concern is not resolved. The fix is now even simpler because the `
` wrapper (line 66) already exists. The filter links just need HTMX attributes added. Here's what the "All" link should look like: ```html All ``` And each context link: ```html {{ ctx.name }} ``` This works because: 1. `hx-get` makes the request via HTMX instead of full navigation 2. The server returns the full page (no backend changes needed) 3. `hx-select="#next-actions-list"` extracts just the action list div from the response 4. `hx-target="#next-actions-list"` + `hx-swap="outerHTML"` replaces the current list with the filtered one 5. `hx-push-url="true"` updates the browser URL so the filter state is bookmarkable and back-button works 6. The plain `href` remains as the no-JS fallback One consideration: when `hx-select` pulls `#next-actions-list` from the response, the empty state div (`#next-actions-empty-state`) is *outside* that wrapper, so it won't update. You could either: (a) Move the empty state inside `#next-actions-list` (simplest), or (b) Expand the wrapper to include both I'd recommend (a) -- move the empty state div inside `#next-actions-list` so it gets swapped along with the list content. Then the empty state logic is fully server-driven during filter swaps. **Minor -- still open:** Cancel link in `next_action_edit.html` (line 22) still lacks `aria-label="Cancel editing {{ action.title }}"`. Everything else looks good. Once these two items are fixed, I'll give consensus approval.
input.summary: BLOCKING still open: filter links need HTMX attrs for partial swap

content.text:
Re-review sent. To summarize:

**Still blocking:** The context filter links in `next_actions.html` still rely on hx-boost full-page reload instead of using explicit HTMX attributes (`hx-get`, `hx-target`, `hx-select`, `hx-swap`, `hx-push-url`) for partial swap. The wrapper div `#next-actions-list` is already in place, making the fix straightforward. I provided exact code samples. Also recommended moving the empty state div inside the wrapper so it gets swapped correctly during filtering.

**Still minor:** Cancel link in `next_action_edit.html` missing `aria-label`.

I cannot give consensus approval until the blocking item is resolved. Waiting for the next update.
